title: New journal backend!
body:
I've completed a new version of Plate and with this I've decided to re-make the way this post system works. Now, pages are static and can be accessed individually instead of being dropdowns on the main site. This has greatly improved page loading as the size of the page has now increased drastically now that content isn't stored on the main page. These pages can now be shared easily..

Thanks!

title: TRCS highlight
body:
TRCS is my low-level cross-platform semi-relay server! Check it out!

Thanks!
